low_gi.description: Low Glycemic Index diet for diabetes management (GI < 55)
low_gi.rationale: High-GI foods cause rapid postprandial glucose spikes, worsening glycaemic control in T2DM
low_gi.source: ADA 2024 — Standards of Medical Care in Diabetes

no_sugar.description: Strict no added sugar — includes all refined and natural sugars
no_sugar.rationale: Direct glycaemic threat. All forms of concentrated sugar contraindicated in active diabetes

no_refined_carbs.rationale: Refined carbohydrates stripped of fibre cause rapid glucose absorption

low_potassium.rationale: Hyperkalaemia in CKD causes fatal cardiac arrhythmias. Strict dietary K+ control mandatory

low_phosphorus.rationale: Phosphorus retention in CKD causes secondary hyperparathyroidism and vascular calcification

low_sodium.rationale: Excess sodium worsens hypertension, fluid retention, and accelerates CKD progression

fluid_restricted.description: Fluid intake restricted to 1000-1200ml/day in dialysis/ESRD
fluid_restricted.notes: Count all fluid sources including water content in foods. Dialysis patients must strictly comply.
fluid_restricted.rationale: Fluid overload in ESRD causes pulmonary oedema and cardiac complications

renal_diet.description: Comprehensive renal diet — combined K+, P, Na, fluid restriction
renal_diet.rationale: Renal failure impairs excretion of K+, P, Na. Combined restriction prevents life-threatening accumulation

low_fiber.description: Low fibre diet post-surgery (< 10g/day) to reduce bowel stimulation
low_fiber.rationale: Post-GI surgery requires minimal bowel activity to allow anastomotic healing

low_residue.description: Low-residue diet minimising undigested material reaching the colon
low_residue.rationale: Reduces stool volume and frequency to protect surgical sites in colon/rectal procedures

easy_digest.description: Easy-to-digest foods only for post-operative or compromised GI function
easy_digest.rationale: Post-surgical gut motility is impaired. Easily digestible foods minimise GI workload

no_spicy.rationale: Spices irritate the gastric and intestinal mucosa post-surgery

no_raw_vegetables.description: No raw vegetables — all must be cooked, steamed or pureed
no_raw_vegetables.rationale: Raw vegetable fibre is indigestible post-GI surgery

liquid.notes: All items must be in liquid form. No solid particles. Clear soups, strained dals, juices only.

soft.notes: Soft, moist foods. No hard or chewy textures. Idli, soft khichdi, well-cooked dals.

solid.notes: Regular diet with all restrictions applied.
